LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MARIE GILO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL OF CROSS-COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 10, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ALL MOVING AND OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 28, 2012. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO GIVE NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE TO OPPOSING COUNSEL. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. SERVED NOV-28-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GILO, MARIE R
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT GILO, MARIE R AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. ROES 1 THROUGH 10
NOTICE OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL OF X-COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GILO, MARIE R HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-26-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MARIE GILO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL OF CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE DISMISSAL OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT VIOLATED CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 581(I) AND (J) AND IS THUS VOID ON ITS FACE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO HAVE THE ENTIRE ACTION REINSTATED IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A MOTION SEEKING SUCH RELIEF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of X-Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NATHANIEL BIGGER, TEL. NO. 295-4735 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARIE GILO's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of cross-Complaint is Granted. The dismissal of the Cross-Complaint violated Code of Civil Procedure sections 581(i) and (j) and is thus void on its face. Plaintiff's request to have the entire action reinstated is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff may file a motion seeking such relief. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/HK

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of X-Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: NATHANIAL BIGGER, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF NATHANIEL BIGGER, 415.295.4735, FOR DEFENDANT MARIE GILO; No other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARIE GILO'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Cross-Complaint is continued to October 10, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Counsel for defendant to deliver courtesy copies of all moving and opposition papers to Department 302 no later than September 28, 2012. Counsel for defendant to give notice of new hearing date to opposing counsel. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
